ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The URL of your Kavita server (e.g., http://localhost:5000).
ast.target: 您的 Kavita 服务器 URL（例如，http://localhost:5000）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 您服务器的 API 密钥。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Single file exports all annotations to one file. Hierarchical creates folders for each series with separate book files.
ast.target: 单个文件将所有注释导出到一个文件中。分层模式会为每个系列创建文件夹，并包含单独的书籍文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to the Markdown file where annotations will be saved.
ast.target: 注释将保存到的 Markdown 文件路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Name of the folder where series folders will be created.
ast.target: 将创建系列文件夹的文件夹名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically remove files when their source annotations are deleted.
ast.target: 当源注释被删除时，自动移除相关文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include your comments and notes with each annotation.
ast.target: 在每个注释中包含您的评论和笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 包含标记为剧透的注释。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Generate Obsidian tags from series, author, and library names (e.g., #kavita/series/the-great-gatsby).
ast.target: 根据系列、作者和库名称生成 Obsidian 标签（例如 #kavita/series/the-great-gatsby）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional prefix for genre tags (e.g., 'genre/' produces #genre/fiction).
ast.target: 类型标签的可选前缀（例如 'genre/' 会生成 #genre/fiction）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create [[wikilinks]] for series and author names to link to existing notes.
ast.target: 为系列和作者名称创建 [[wikilinks]] 以链接到现有笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Customize how each annotation is formatted. Variables: {{blockquote}} (blockquoted text), {{selectedText}} (raw text), {{comment}}, {{pageNumber}}, {{chapterTitle}}, {{seriesName}}, {{createdUtc}}. Use {{#if variable}}...{{/if}} for conditionals.
ast.target: 自定义每个批注的格式。变量：{{blockquote}}（引用文本）、{{selectedText}}（原始文本）、{{comment}}、{{pageNumber}}、{{chapterTitle}}、{{seriesName}}、{{createdUtc}}。使用 {{#if variable}}...{{/if}} 进行条件判断。

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 输入您的 API 密钥

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Authentication failed. Check your API key in settings.
ast.target: 认证失败。请在设置中检查您的 API 密钥。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Access denied. Your API key may be invalid or expired.
ast.target: 访问被拒绝。您的 API 密钥可能无效或已过期。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Kavita server not found. Check your URL in settings.
ast.target: 未找到 Kavita 服务器。请在设置中检查您的 URL。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Unexpected response - update plugin or server version.
ast.target: 意外响应 - 请更新插件或服务器版本。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please configure server URL in plugin settings
ast.target: 请在插件设置中配置服务器 URL

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please configure API key in plugin settings
ast.target: 请在插件设置中配置 API 密钥

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Sync failed unexpectedly. Check the developer console.
ast.target: 同步意外失败。请检查开发者控制台。

ast.name: description
ast.source: can not create stream from empty body

ast.name: message
ast.source: Found a '=' character, but it is not at the end
ast.target: 发现 '=' 字符，但它不在末尾

ast.name: message
ast.source: cannot serialize to string, Symbol is not registered
ast.target: 无法序列化为字符串，Symbol 未注册

ast.name: text
ast.source: Files in hierarchical mode are fully managed by this plugin and regenerated on each sync. Any manual edits will be lost.
ast.target: 在分层模式下，文件完全由此插件管理，并在每次同步时重新生成。任何手动编辑都将丢失。
